items.title: Top Research Reports for Applied Materials, McDonald's & Texas Instruments
items.description: Applied Materials, McDonald's and Texas Instruments headline Zacks' top research as chip rebound, Q4 beats and data center demand drive momentum.

items.title: McDonald’s testing high-protein menu options for GLP-1 users
items.description: While McDonald's says it's "pretty protein-forward," the fast food chain is still looking to adapt its menu for GLP-1 users.

items.title: Is Digital Adoption Strengthening Dutch Bros' Drive-Thru Model?
items.description: BROS closes 2025 with rising digital adoption as Order Ahead hits 14% of Q4 transactions and loyalty tops 15M members, fueling sales growth.

items.title: Is Chipotle Leveraging AI to Reengage Lapsed Customers?
items.description: CMG is using AI-driven personalization to re-engage lapsed customers, aiming to lift loyalty activity and strengthen digital sales performance.

items.title: Find Your Balance: 3 Stocks With Incredibly Durable Cash Flow, Dividends, Value and Growth
items.description: Finding perfection in the world of individual stocks is so darn difficult. That’s why so many investors resort to index funds, exchange traded funds, and other vehicles which allow for passive equity exposure. I’ve got nothing against such investing vehicles, and in fact, ETFs and index funds make up a sizable portion of my own ... Find Your Balance: 3 Stocks With Incredibly Durable Cash Flow, Dividends, Value and Growth
